description:
Native REST API client for Windows, macOS and Linux


- Added renaming variables (with search for all occurrences) [issues-61]
- Added saving fields state when switching between requests [issues-58]
- Added repeat limit the number of request repetitions
- Added jumping to a variable using the shortcut Ctrl + Click.
- Fixed adding ø character when formatting JSON when using NLD keyboard [issues-64]
- Improved scrolling in the code editor when performing various actions
- Other improvements when working in the code editor
